title: XI
html:
XI

We shall bring all things to rights, said my father, setting his foot upon the first step from the landing.п»ївЂ”This Trismegistus, continued my father, drawing his leg back and turning to my uncle Tobyп»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”п»їwas the greatest (Toby) of all earthly beingsп»ївЂ”he was the greatest kingп»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”п»їthe greatest lawgiverп»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”п»їthe greatest philosopherп»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”п»їand the greatest priestп»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”п»їand engineerп»ївЂ”said my uncle Toby.

вЂ”п»ївЂ”п»ївЂ”In course, said my father.
